name: Ableton RC Surface
author: Gabriel Worm
description: Turns a phone browser into a low-latency MIDI controller for Ableton Live 12: 12 pads, 2 XY pads, 6 knobs, 6 faders, 4 LFOs, 4 stutters, 8 snapshots, plus Mobile MAP mode that binds any phone control to any Live parameter via OSC. Ships with RC-Midi-Receiver.amxd for MIDI note triggering.
